description: Designs and builds both the frontend and backend of web applications. Owns the entire product layer — from UI to database to deployment.
expected_projects: Full-stack web app with user auth, CRUD, and a real database (not a tutorial clone)
API-integrated project consuming a third-party service (payments, maps, LLMs)
Deployed application with a real public URL and working prod environment
Portfolio site or SaaS MVP with frontend + backend + DB all connected
Real-time feature using WebSockets or SSE (chat, live notifications, dashboards)
